description: FINRA-registered broker-dealer undergoing KYB with regulated financial institution exemption applied to beneficial ownership rule
parsed_text:
KYC / KNOW YOUR BUSINESS (KYB) — REGULATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTION
Legal Entity Name: Meridian Capital Securities LLC
Customer Type: Business
EIN: XX-XXX7743
Entity Classification: Broker-Dealer (Registered)
Regulatory Registration: FINRA Member — CRD# XXXXX8801; SEC Registered — Registration No. 8-XXXXX902
Business Address: 200 Park Avenue, 38th Floor, New York, NY 10166, USA
Phone: (212) 555-0160   Email: institutional@meridiancap.example
Business Activity: Full-service broker-dealer; equity and fixed income trading, investment banking advisory
Source of Funds: Brokerage commissions, underwriting fees, proprietary trading revenue
Expected Monthly Activity: $4,200,000

REGULATED ENTITY EXEMPTION — BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP RULE
Per 31 CFR 1010.230(e)(2), regulated financial institutions that are subject to AML program requirements are exempt from the beneficial ownership identification and verification requirements as legal entity customers. Meridian Capital Securities LLC is a registered broker-dealer subject to FINRA Rule 3310 and SEC Rule 17a-8. Exemption applied: Beneficial ownership form NOT required.
Control Person Identified: Diana Kessler, Chief Compliance Officer

IDENTITY AND LICENSING DOCUMENTS REVIEWED
FINRA BrokerCheck: Confirmed — no disclosure events, active registration.
SEC EDGAR: Confirmed — Form BD current, annual amendment filed 2025-03-01.
NYS DFS License: Active.

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear.
FATF High-Risk Country Exposure: Minimal — no correspondent relationships with FATF-listed jurisdictions.
PEP Status: Not applicable at entity level; control person Diana Kessler — no PEP flag.
Adverse Media: One FINRA regulatory notice (2022) for recordkeeping deficiency; $45,000 fine; corrective measures implemented.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No
Risk Rating: Medium
CDD Level: Standard
Compliance Notes: Regulated entity exemption documented and supervisor-approved. Annual FINRA certification reviewed.
Review Date: 2025-11-04   Reviewer: Marcus Holden
